layman_headline: The crypto market is fearful and weak — no high-conviction trade exists right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' zone with most altcoins declining 6-12% over the past week while Bitcoin holds relatively steady. This means money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin or stablecoins. None of the candidates on our watchlist present a clean setup with strong enough technical or news backing to justify risking capital. The best candidate, TRUMP, has an oversold RSI of 29 which historically signals bounces, but the chart structure is bearish with no supporting catalyst.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is weak and there's no clear edge right now. Better setups will emerge when fear peaks and reversal signals appear with volume confirmation.
expert_reasoning: I evaluated all 10 swing candidates and found no setup meeting our quality threshold. TRUMP's RSI at 29 is the strongest individual signal (RSI has a 75% win rate in our signal credibility data), but the chart bias is -0.70 (bearish), price is below all major MAs, and there's no volume breakout (our most reliable signal at 100% win rate). BTC dominance at 56.3% is crushing altcoins, and Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but hasn't reached extreme fear levels where contrarian entries historically work best. HTX has the best chart bias (+1.10) but RSI is already at 58 and the token has minimal liquidity. Without a volume breakout or strong news catalyst from CoinTelegraph (100% win rate), entering any position here would be catching a falling knife.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% continues to drain capital from altcoins — any alt position faces structural headwinds
Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but hasn't reached capitulation levels (sub-15) where bounces are most reliable
No volume breakouts detected on any candidate — our highest-reliability signal is absent
watch_list: TRUMP RSI dropping below 25 with a bullish divergence or volume spike — would upgrade to a BUY
Fear & Greed index dropping below 20 (extreme fear) which historically precedes broader market bounces
BTC reclaiming $65,000+ which could signal risk-on rotation back into altcoins
market_context: The crypto market is in a mild fear regime with BTC flat near $63,800 while altcoins bleed 5-12% weekly. High BTC dominance (56.3%) signals capital rotation away from alts, making this a poor environment for altcoin swing trades.
context_banner: Market fear is elevated but not extreme — patience is the highest-probability play until a volume-confirmed reversal or catalyst emerges.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) is improving from 24 weekly average but hasn't reached capitulation levels that produce reliable bounce entries.
TRUMP RSI at 29 is the most oversold candidate and our RSI signal has a 75% win rate, but without volume confirmation the bounce probability is insufficient.
No volume breakout detected on any candidate — this is our most reliable signal (100% win rate) and its absence is a strong reason to stay sidelined.
Bitcoin nearing Fidelity's power law support line and stablecoin market cap shrinking by $10B suggest caution but no imminent crash — sideways chop likely continues.
ETH derivatives reset and DePIN/gaming rebound hints suggest sector rotation may create opportunities soon, but no actionable catalyst for current candidates.
